description: A Block represents a component in the UI that displays data from a message or field.

^(code_block)$.description:
Render the data as a code block.  Only valid for string type data.
 Optionally, a language can be specified for syntax highlighting.

^(description_list)$.description: Render the data as a description list (key-value pairs).

avatar.description: Render the data as an avatar.

badge.description: Render the data as a badge.  Only valid for string type data.

card.description: Render the data as a card.  Can contain other components.

codeBlock.description:
Render the data as a code block.  Only valid for string type data.
 Optionally, a language can be specified for syntax highlighting.

custom.description: Custom component.  The data will be passed to the custom component as is.

descriptionList.description: Render the data as a description list (key-value pairs).

divider.description: Render the data as a divider/separator.

heading.description: Render as a heading.  Only valid for string type data.

label.description: Render as a label.  Only valid for string type data.

list.description: Render the data as a list.  Only valid for repeated scalar fields.

markdown.description: Render as markdown.  Only valid for string type data.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata that can be used by the UI renderer.

progress.description: Render the data as progress.  Only valid for numeric type data.

secret.description: Render the data as a secret (masked text with reveal option).

table.description: Render the data as a table.  Only valid for repeated Message fields.

text.description: Render the data as text with optional styling.

tree.description: Render the data as a tree structure.  Only valid for hierarchical data.

title: Component
